reviews.comment:
Quisimos cargar agua y nos dijeron q se usaba para el carwash y por lo tanto no nos autorizaban a hacerlo. Mala predisposicion!!

(Translated by Google)
We wanted to fill up our tank with water, but they told us it was used for the car wash and therefore they wouldn't authorize it. Very unhelpful!
